大发大小单双正规单带回本导师【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239100466_64210250<br>vk.com/topic-239100469_64648739<br>vk.com/topic-239100534_63875643<br>vk.com/topic-239061414_63875645<br>vk.com/topic-239100461_65528578<br>vk.com/topic-239079485_63792013<br>vk.com/topic-239065386_64210322<br>vk.com/topic-239100502_64489837<br>vk.com/topic-239100498_64379234<br>vk.com/topic-239090068_64379238<br>vk.com/topic-239079469_64648789<br>vk.com/topic-239100572_64489865<br>vk.com/topic-239043430_64951135<br>vk.com/topic-239100512_64489891<br>vk.com/topic-239100606_64210386<br>vk.com/topic-239100565_63792053<br>vk.com/topic-239056832_64489947<br>vk.com/topic-239100486_64210419<br>vk.com/topic-239100484_63875769<br>vk.com/topic-239100479_64648894<br>vk.com/topic-239100514_63875772<br>vk.com/topic-239100490_64951188<br>vk.com/topic-239100515_63792126<br>vk.com/topic-239100488_64379320<br>vk.com/topic-239092637_65322969<br>vk.com/topic-239100462_64489975<br>vk.com/topic-239100522_64489976<br>vk.com/topic-239100510_64951200<br>vk.com/topic-239100459_64648915<br>vk.com/topic-239100521_65528702<br>vk.com/topic-239100463_64065372<br>vk.com/topic-239100511_65528708<br>vk.com/topic-239100458_64379328<br>vk.co
